location_description: My grandma lives in Miami, Florida. How much rain should she expect over the next year?
A FAWN agricultural monitoring station in Miami-Dade County, Florida (station 107).
My grandma lives in a Gulf coast Florida city of about 100,000 people — not Miami or Tampa. How much rain should she expect over the next year?
A Gulf coast Florida city with roughly 100,000 residents (Pensacola area, FAWN station 204).
